programmes.show_description: Else sends a letter inviting everyone to Australia - everyone but Alf, that is. S6 E7: The Letter
With Billy Connolly, Tom O'Connor and The Pretenders. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy show from Thames TV, all in the best possible taste!
While he is in South America, the local police engage Simon in a crooked arms deal that intends to spark a revolution. S3 E5: The Revolution Racket

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
A famed US general was injured in a car crash in Germany, appeared to recover, then died suddenly. Accident, murder, or post war tension? Narrated by Robert Powell.
We explore some of the most infamous battles in America's fight against terror as the Vietnam war begins, we look at the activities and stories of Medal of Honor recipients and the end of the war.
Regular American units fought under rules of engagement; learn how their covert missions were carried out in North Vietnam, Laos and Cambodia. S2 E12: Vietnam - Special Operations
A look at how the West End became a place for the wealthy elite, the impact of the railways, a cholera epidemic and engineer Joseph Bazalgette saving London with his new sewerage system. Ep3
Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far-flung corners of the Empire - the boats flew long missions over the oceans looking for enemy submarines. Ep5: By Air, By Sea
The Free French Forces led by de Gaulle refused to accept the armistice their country had signed with Germany and crossed the Channel to join the fight in Britain. Ep12: The Free French Forces
An examination of the ultimate purpose of the prehistoric monument on Salisbury Plain as a team of experts embark on a daunting task to rebuild Stonehenge as it was 4,000 years ago.
The story of the Blitz of Britain and how Nazi bombers guided to targets by electronic beams were defeated by Dr Reginald Jones in the Battle of the Beams. Ep6: The Man Who Saved Britain's Cities
...You? There are some news events that change the world - we take you back to the 26th of December, 2004 and the Indonesian tsunami.
The war takes root in Africa as an ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid. Ep7: Desert War
Explore the events leading to one of WW2's most significant and notorious battles, the Battle of Stalingrad, and see how the USSR prepared for German attack as Germany planned to break their pact. E1
As Britain alone faced German forces with Nazi troops storming across Europe at great speed, the course of the war was far from certain. S1 E8: The Battle of Britain
An Irishman attempts to bribe Lady Marjorie with love letters she had once written; Thomas gets wrapped up in the web of deceit, but will money get the better of him? S2 E6: The Property of a Lady
Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage from the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph - a small monastic order just off the A2. S8 E2: A Bouquet of Barbed Wine
When a girl is followed home from a laundrette and abducted, Dempsey gets concerned when the man responsible seems to want Makepeace to find him. S3 E6: Out of Darkness
When a dead body in a canal is identified as a man reported missing by his glamorous wife, the investigation puts both Gene and Alex in danger. S2 E6
Alf decides to put his house on the market and move into the Reads' as their lodger, but falls foul of Min's amorous advances. S7 E1: Moving in with Min
With Terry Wogan, Michael Aspel and Hot Chocolate. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy show from Thames TV, all in the best possible taste!
Simon is asked to help a developer's daughter when a new textile formula is created and she receives a threatening letter. S3 E6: The Saint Steps In

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
By December 1941, did Britain know of the Pearl Harbour plans, and did Churchill warn Roosevelt so he could move the US carriers. Narrated by Robert Powell.
The USA has been at the forefront of fighting acts of terror across the world. We look at the development of the Delta force and the use of Special Units in Iran, Grenada, Panama and the Gulf War.
It was a battle no-one really wanted and a victory far greater than anyone expected - Israel fought the Six Day War and were outnumbered and outgunned. S2 E13: Shadows of the Six Day War
An exploration of London's underground railway and skyline, the origins of Metro-land - London's vast suburbia - and the clever marketing that tempted millions to move outside the city. Ep4
After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49 as well as flying round-the-clock operations into its airport. Ep6: Supplies From the Skies
We take a look at the Australian and New Zealand Army Corps (Anzacs) who first saw active service in Libya with the British when they forced the Italian army to surrender. Ep13: The Anzacs
Tom Selleck chronicles the personal stories of veterans and citizens who witnessed the 1941 surprise attack by the Japanese on the American Pacific Fleet launching the United States into World War II
Tank development was dramatic in World War II; we see the emergence of monster tanks from pre-war light tanks, but were the German tanks over-engineered and too vulnerable to breakdown? Ep1: Tanks
...Were You? There are some news events that change the world - we take you back to some of Northern Ireland's darkest days and the journey towards lasting peace that was agreed on Good Friday 1998.
The brave men and women who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories of Japanese and US forces facing off with an intense determination and will to survive. Ep8: Hell In The Pacific
The German Army was first met with success on the Eastern Front as they took swathes of land and countless prisoners of war - later, however, their progress stalled in the icy conditions. E2
They are the means by which to confuse an enemy - from inflatable decoy tanks to fake radio broadcasts, deception played a key role in the course of WWII. S1 E9: Tools of Deception
Having brothers visit them in London causes both Richard and Hudson complications and strained relations, but will the repercussions be worse for Hudson? S2 E7: Your Obedient Servant
When his wife goes missing, Arthur is under suspicion, but he's got a more important cash flow matter to contend with. S8 E3: Whatever Happened to Her Indoors?
Exploring the world of showbiz.
What looks like a simple drugs drop at a building site turns into a murder case, and Alex is haunted by thoughts of her parents' death. S2 E7
